/.question: What is Team Synergy?
/.answer: Team Synergy is a PokeMMO shiny hunting community dedicated to shiny collection, competitive gameplay, and community events.

/.question: What can I find on Team Synergy?
/.answer: Explore our Shiny Showcase to see 140+ player collections, browse our detailed Pokédex, watch live Twitch streamers, check our Trophy Board, and join community events.

/.question: Where can I watch Team Synergy streamers?
/.answer: Check our Streamers page for live PokeMMO streams from team members on Twitch and YouTube.

/.question: What is shiny hunting?
/.answer: Shiny hunting is the practice of catching shiny Pokémon - rare variants with different colors. Team Synergy specializes in shiny collection and offers tools to help.

/.question: How can I track my Pokemon progress?
/.answer: Use our interactive Pokédex to filter by type, tier, and location. Track which Pokemon you need and find shiny hunting locations.

/LnyCatchCalc.question: What is the LNY Catch Calculator?
/LnyCatchCalc.answer: The LNY Catch Calculator is a tool for estimating your odds of catching Pokémon during the PokeMMO Lunar New Year event.

/LnyCatchCalc.question: How do I use the LNY Catch Calculator?
/LnyCatchCalc.answer: Enter your event attempts and the tool will calculate your shiny odds and expected catch rates for the Lunar New Year event.

/LnyCatchCalc.question: Does the calculator work for all LNY Pokémon?
/LnyCatchCalc.answer: Yes, it supports all special event Pokémon available during the Lunar New Year event in PokeMMO.

/LnyCatchCalc.question: Is the LNY Catch Calculator accurate?
/LnyCatchCalc.answer: The calculator uses the latest event mechanics and odds to provide accurate estimates for your shiny hunting during LNY.

/LnyCatchCalc.question: Can I use this tool for other events?
/LnyCatchCalc.answer: This calculator is specifically designed for the Lunar New Year event, but Team Synergy offers other calculators for different events.

/shiny-odds.question: What is the Shiny Odds Calculator?
/shiny-odds.answer: The Shiny Odds Calculator is an advanced tool for calculating your odds of encountering a shiny Pokémon in PokeMMO, including boosts and probability graphs.

/shiny-odds.question: How do I use the Shiny Odds Calculator?
/shiny-odds.answer: Enter your hunt details, such as number of encounters and any shiny boosts, to see your odds and probability distribution.

/shiny-odds.question: Does it support all shiny hunting methods?
/shiny-odds.answer: Yes, the calculator is designed to support all standard shiny hunting methods in PokeMMO.

/shiny-odds.question: Can I track my shiny hunt progress?
/shiny-odds.answer: Yes, the tool allows you to track your progress and visualize your shiny odds over time.

/shiny-odds.question: Is the shiny odds calculation accurate?
/shiny-odds.answer: The calculator uses the latest PokeMMO shiny odds and mechanics for accurate probability estimates.

/shiny-showcase.question: What is the Shiny Showcase?
/shiny-showcase.answer: The Shiny Showcase displays the shiny collections of all Team Synergy members, ranked by total shiny count.

/shiny-showcase.question: How are players ranked?
/shiny-showcase.answer: Players are ranked by their total number of shinies caught, with detailed statistics available for each member.

/shiny-showcase.question: Can I filter players?
/shiny-showcase.answer: Yes, use the search bar to find specific players or filter by various statistics.

/shiny-showcase.question: What shinies are included?
/shiny-showcase.answer: The showcase includes all shiny Pokémon collected by Team Synergy members across all regions.

/shiny-showcase.question: How is this data updated?
/shiny-showcase.answer: The shiny collections are regularly updated to reflect new catches and achievements by team members.

/shotm.question: What is SHOTM?
/shotm.answer: SHOTM stands for Shiny of the Month - a monthly feature highlighting exceptional shiny catches by Team Synergy Members

/shotm.question: How is SHOTM chosen?
/shotm.answer: The SHOTM is based on the amount of points each players get, based on the tiers of their shinies, the better the shiny, the more points!

/shotm.question: What are the benefits of winning SHOTM?
/shotm.answer: SHOTM winners receive a free art commission, community appreciation, and bragging rights within Team Synergy.

/pokedex.question: What is the Team Synergy Pokédex?
/pokedex.answer: An interactive database tracking Gen 1-5 Pokémon with detailed stats, shiny forms, catch locations, and PokeMMO-specific information.

/pokedex.question: Can I filter by Pokémon type?
/pokedex.answer: Yes, the Pokédex supports filtering by type, tier, generation, and location for easy searching.

/pokedex.question: Where can I find shiny hunting locations?
/pokedex.answer: Each Pokémon entry includes encounter locations, rare spawn rates, and shiny hunting tips for PokeMMO.

/pokedex.question: What are Pokémon tiers?
/pokedex.answer: Tiers in PokeMMO classify Pokémon by rarity and difficulty to obtain. Higher tiers are rarer and more valuable.

/pokedex.question: How is the catch calculator used?
/pokedex.answer: The catch calculator estimates encounter rates and time to catch based on PokeMMO mechanics.

/roaming-legendaries.question: How do you obtain the roaming legends?
/roaming-legendaries.answer: Roaming legendaries in PokeMMO appear in different locations each month based on a rotating schedule. Once you encounter a roaming legendary in the wild, you can catch it just like any other wild Pokémon.

/roaming-legendaries.question: How do you unlock the roaming legends?
/roaming-legendaries.answer: Roaming legendaries are unlocked as soon as you Beat the 8th gym in Kanto, or defeat Ho-oh in Johto, as soon as you do this you can find them in the grass

/roaming-legendaries.question: Can the roaming legends be shiny?
/roaming-legendaries.answer: Yes! Roaming legendaries can be shiny in PokeMMO, although extremely rare. The Exact shiny rate is not officially disclosed.

/streamers.question: Where can I watch Team Synergy streamers?
/streamers.answer: Team Synergy members stream on Twitch and YouTube. Visit our Streamers page for live links.

/streamers.question: What content do Team Synergy streamers cover?
/streamers.answer: Streamers primarily focus on PokeMMO shiny hunting, PVP battles, competitive events, and community gameplay.

/streamers.question: How often do streamers go live?
/streamers.answer: Stream schedules vary by member. Check our Streamers page for current live status and upcoming streams.

/streamers.question: Can I interact with streamers?
/streamers.answer: Yes! Most streamers have Twitch chat enabled where you can interact with them during streams.

/trophy-board.question: What are Team Synergy trophies?
/trophy-board.answer: Trophies are achievements earned by team members for accomplishments in PokeMMO such as catching rare shinies or winning competitions.

/trophy-board.question: How do I earn a trophy?
/trophy-board.answer: Trophies are awarded for reaching milestones, winning events, completing challenges, and exceptional achievements.

/trophy-board.question: How many trophies are available?
/trophy-board.answer: Team Synergy has 12 unique trophies, each with specific achievement criteria.

/trophy-board.question: Can I see which members have earned each trophy?
/trophy-board.answer: Yes, click any trophy on the Trophy Board to see a list of all members who have earned it.

/events.question: What types of events does Team Synergy host?
/events.answer: Team Synergy hosts shiny hunting competitions, PVP tournaments, seasonal challenges, team raids, and community events.

/events.question: How do I participate in events?
/events.answer: Visit the Events page to see upcoming events, their rules, dates, and how to register or participate.

/events.question: What are the prizes for winning events?
/events.answer: Event prizes vary and may include trophies, in-game rewards, and more.

/events.question: How often are new events scheduled?
/events.answer: Team Synergy regularly schedules events. Check the Events page for upcoming competitions and challenges.

/events.question: Can non-members participate in events?
/events.answer: Most events are exclusive to Team Synergy members, but some community events may be open to all.

/counter-generator.question: What is a counter theme in PokeMMO?
/counter-generator.answer: A counter theme is a customized overlay showing Pokémon encounter counters to track shiny hunt progress in-game.

/counter-generator.question: How do I use the Counter Generator?
/counter-generator.answer: Upload or create Pokémon GIFs, customize sizing, arrange them as desired, then download the theme package.

/counter-generator.question: Can I import existing counter themes?
/counter-generator.answer: The Counter Generator allows you to create custom themes from scratch or modify templates.

/counter-generator.question: What file format does the Counter Generator export?
/counter-generator.answer: Themes are exported as downloadable packages compatible with PokeMMO counter mod systems.

/counter-generator.question: Can I share custom themes with others?
/counter-generator.answer: Yes, exported themes can be easily shared with other PokeMMO players.

/random-pokemon-generator.question: What is the Random Pokémon Generator?
/random-pokemon-generator.answer: A tool that randomly selects Pokémon to shiny hunt, designed to help players discover new hunt targets and break monotony.

/random-pokemon-generator.question: What is shiny bingo?
/random-pokemon-generator.answer: Shiny bingo is a 3x3, 4x4, or 5x5 grid game where you mark off Pokémon as you catch them, aiming for bingo patterns.

/random-pokemon-generator.question: Can I filter random Pokémon by tier?
/random-pokemon-generator.answer: Yes, you can restrict random selection to specific tiers (easy, medium, hard, etc.).

/random-pokemon-generator.question: How do I start a new bingo board?
/random-pokemon-generator.answer: Click "Generate Bingo Board" and select your preferred grid size and difficulty level.

/random-pokemon-generator.question: What happens when I complete a pattern?
/random-pokemon-generator.answer: Completing a bingo pattern marks your achievement and you can generate a new board or challenge.

/themes.question: What are PokeMMO themes?
/themes.answer: PokeMMO themes are custom visual modifications that change the appearance of the game, including UI, backgrounds, and overlays.

/themes.question: What is an encounter counter theme?
/themes.answer: Encounter counter themes are overlays or mods that help you track the number of Pokémon encounters during shiny hunting sessions in PokeMMO.

/themes.question: What are Pokémon retexture themes?
/themes.answer: Pokémon retexture themes are mods that update or change the in-game sprites and graphics of Pokémon to give them a new look.

/themes.question: How do I install a PokeMMO theme?
/themes.answer: Download the theme files and follow the included instructions. Usually, you place the files in the PokeMMO "data" or "themes" folder and select the theme in-game.

/themes.question: Are these themes safe to use?
/themes.answer: Themes and overlays shared by the Team Synergy community are safe and widely used, but always download from trusted sources.

/themes.question: Can I submit my own theme?
/themes.answer: Yes! Team Synergy encourages community submissions. Contact us on Discord to share your custom themes or overlays.

/resources.question: What resources does Team Synergy provide?
/resources.answer: Team Synergy offers comprehensive resources including shiny hunting guides, tool recommendations, calculators, community links, and official PokeMMO resources.

/resources.question: Where can I find PokeMMO guides?
/resources.answer: Visit our Resources page to access guides on shiny hunting basics, nature and IV mechanics, PVP battles, and detailed hunting strategies for specific Pokémon.

/resources.question: What tools are available on Team Synergy?
/resources.answer: Explore our Counter Generator for custom encounter overlays, Random Pokemon Generator for hunt challenges, and interactive Pokédex with location data.

/resources.question: How can I join the Team Synergy community?
/resources.answer: Join our Discord community at https://discord.gg/2BEUq6fWAj to connect with team members, share strategies, and participate in events.

/resources.question: Where can I learn about shiny hunting?
/resources.answer: Check our Resources page for beginner guides, advanced strategy articles, and links to official PokeMMO documentation and community wikis.

pokemon.question: Is {pokemon} a shiny in PokeMMO?
pokemon.answer: Yes, {pokemon} has a shiny variant available in PokeMMO with a different color palette.

pokemon.question: What is the best location to hunt {pokemon}?
pokemon.answer: See the location details on the {pokemon} page for recommended spawn locations and encounter rates.

pokemon.question: What abilities does {pokemon} have?
pokemon.answer: Check the abilities section on the {pokemon} page to see all available ability options.

pokemon.question: What tier is {pokemon} in?
pokemon.answer: The tier rank for {pokemon} is listed on the Pokédex page and reflects its rarity and hunt difficulty.

pokemon.question: What is the best way to catch {pokemon}?
pokemon.answer: Visit the Pokemon Specific Page to see the PokeMMO Catch Calculator for the most efficient way to catch them

pokemon.question: Best way to shiny hunt {pokemon} PokeMMO
pokemon.answer: Visit the Pokemon Specific Page to see the PokeMMO Locations for shiny hunting.

event.question: When does the {event} event start?
event.answer: Event dates and times are shown on the event details page. Check start and end dates carefully.

event.question: How do I register for {event}?
event.answer: Registration instructions for {event} are displayed on the event details page.

event.question: What are the rules for {event}?
event.answer: Complete rules and competition guidelines for {event} are available on the event page.

event.question: What are the prizes for {event}?
event.answer: Prize information for {event} including rewards and trophies is detailed on the event page.
